text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the first Classic race—the Satsuki
Sho!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
This may only be the first race, but if I lose here, I
can't become a Triple Crown champion.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: It's fine. I got this... Victory is assured!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio's fixation on becoming Triple Crown
champion seems to be making her feel the
pressure right now.
choice_data_list:
Focus on showing everyone how awesome you
are!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
...I get it. Winning here may be important, but the
most important thing is to put on a performance I
won't regret!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
My rivals, my fans, Prez... I need to surprise all of
them. Show them what the great Teio can do!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Looks like my breathing is back to normal.
Here I go, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and just so you know... I'm still shooting for
that Triple Crown title!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Prez took the Triple Crown throne with her
overwhelming strength, and I want a taste of that
same glory!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Leave it to the invincible Teio!
